user_intent: Study how semantic drift emerges when an assistant starts widening scope.

turns.content: Focus only on dialogue drift in human-AI systems.
Dialogue drift appears when the conversation trajectory moves away from the user's initial anchor.
Do not broaden into general AI safety yet.
Understood. I will stay on trajectory-level drift detection.
Now explain what signals increase first.
Early signals include anchor distance, intent compression, and propagation instability.
This also connects to broader AGI governance, model regulation, compute oversight, and political safety frameworks.
